name: Apple Cheese Icing
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup skim milk cheese or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and slice 2 apples, preferably Golden Delicious, to remain white when cooked.
2. Cook the apples until they reach a soft pulp and allow them to cool.
3. Blend the cooled apples with the dissolved gelatin, cheese, and coloring until smooth.
4. Set aside to set completely.
5. Spread on cake or pipe as desired.
6. Store covered in the refrigerator; may be deep-frozen.
Suggested uses: Child's birthday cake, slab cake cut into squares and decorated with a blob of icing topped with fruit, low-calorie spread for plain cookies or scones. 5 calories in 2 teaspoons. Total recipe: 160 calories, 25 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fiber, 13 grams protein, 2 grams fat.
